title: 20 Marla House for Sale in Wabda Town, Faisalabad
description: This attractive House is located in Wabda Town, Faisalabad, offering great value for families or investors. With a spacious 20 Marla, it offers 6 comfortable bedrooms and 6 modern bathrooms. Available for sale at a reasonable price of 5 Crore, it includes key features like Parking, Furnished. Prime location with easy access to schools, markets, parks, and roads. Ideal for immediate move-in. Contact today!
